title: Embedded SW Engineer - Italian Speaker
description:
Job description
  
  

Vuoi iniziare una nuova avventura professionale come Sviluppatore Software Embedded in una delle nostre opportunità nel settore Aerospace \& Defence a Roma?
  
  

Cosa farai?
  
Sviluppare e mantenere software embedded in ambiente Linux.
  
Implementare funzionalità e ottimizzare componenti software in C/C\+\+.
  
Realizzare script Bash per automazione e gestione delle attività di sviluppo.
  
Collaborare con team multidisciplinari per integrazione e validazione delle soluzioni.
  
Supportare le attività di debugging e troubleshooting del software.
  
Partecipare alle revisioni tecniche e alla gestione del ciclo di sviluppo.
  
Garantire il rispetto degli standard qualitativi e delle best practice di sviluppo.
  
✍️ Cosa Richiediamo?
  
Laurea in Informatica, Ingegneria Informatica o esperienza equivalente.
  
Esperienza di almeno 1\-2 anni nello sviluppo software embedded.
  
Conoscenza di C/C\+\+, Bash e ambiente Linux.
  
Conoscenza della lingua italiana a livello C1/C2 e dell'inglese a livello B2\.
  
Capacità di lavorare in team e di adattarsi a un ambiente dinamico.
  
  

**Nice to have:**  

Gradita esperienza nel settore Aerospace \& Defence.
  
Familiarità con sistemi embedded real\-time e attività di integrazione software.
  
✨ Che cosa offriamo?
  
Una comunità internazionale che riunisce oltre 110 nazionalità diverse.
  
Un ambiente in cui la fiducia è centrale e la crescita interna è valorizzata.
  
Un solido sistema di formazione con Academy interna e moduli disponibili.
  
Un ambiente di lavoro dinamico con eventi interni (afterwork, team building, ecc.).
  
Un forte impegno verso benessere e work\-life balance.
  
  

**Benefici locali in Italia:**  

Buoni pasto.
  
Opzioni di lavoro flessibili secondo policy aziendale.
  
Assicurazione sanitaria e programmi di benessere, ove applicabili.
  
Remunerazione e trasparenza
  
**Gross Annual Salary Range:** EUR 24\.000 – EUR 36\.000
  
CCNL del Commercio
  
La fascia retributiva è definita secondo criteri oggettivi e neutri rispetto al genere.
  
Durante il processo di selezione non chiederemo informazioni sulla tua retribuzione attuale o precedente.
  
  

Le nostre fasce retributive sono volutamente ampie, perché cerchiamo persone di talento, non “profili standard”. Uno stesso ruolo può attrarre candidature molto diverse tra loro, e crediamo sia importante lasciare spazio a questa varietà. La collocazione all’interno della fascia dipenderà dalla tua esperienza specifica, dalle tue competenze e da ciò che potrai portare nel ruolo.
  
  

**La persona ideale si riconosce in questi valori:**  

**Boldness:** il nostro spirito di avventura imprenditoriale è ciò che ci unisce tutti e ci porta al successo.
  
  

**Trust:** la fiducia è il fondamento di tutte le relazioni, la fiducia ci consente di promuovere la libertà di espressione, creatività e innovazione.
  
  

**Performance:** questo si traduce in un desiderio costante di andare avanti e non smettere mai di chiedere di più a noi stessi.
  
  

**Commitment:** non ci limitiamo a rispettare i nostri impegni e lavoriamo duramente per ottenere grandi risultati.
  
  

**Independence:** Amaris Consulting appartiene a chi l'ha creata e a chi la sviluppa ogni giorno.
  
  

Candidandoti per questa posizione, potresti avere l'opportunità di entrare a far parte di un'azienda che supporta i propri partner nei settori Automotive \& Motorsport, Avionic \& Aerospace, Difesa, Railway, Industrial, Domotica e Robotica, con attività di ingegneria meccanica ed elettronica nelle aree Development \& Design, Testing \& Validation, System Engineering, R\&D e Project Management.
  
  

Diversità e Inclusione
  
  

Amaris Consulting promuove pari opportunità e valuta le candidature sulla base di competenze, esperienza e potenziale. Accogliamo candidature qualificate senza discriminazioni legate a genere, identità o espressione di genere, orientamento sessuale, origine etnica, nazionalità, religione o convinzioni personali, età, disabilità, stato civile o familiare, o altre caratteristiche protette.
  
  

Se hai bisogno di adattamenti ragionevoli durante il processo di selezione, comunicacelo: faremo il possibile per supportarti.
  
  

Who are we?
  
Amaris Consulting è una società di consulenza tecnologica indipendente che accompagna e fornisce soluzioni alle imprese.
  
Riunisce più di 7\.500 persone distribuite in 5 continenti e oltre 60 paesi. Con oltre 1\.000 clienti in tutto il mondo, implementiamo soluzioni per grandi progetti da oltre un decennio.
  
I nostri esperti coprono tutti i settori, dai servizi finanziari ai trasporti, dalla sanità alla tecnologia.
  
Amaris è la “stepping stone” che consente di attraversare il guado, il trampolino che permette di proiettarti verso i tuoi obiettivi, affrontare le sfide e realizzare con successo tutti i tuoi progetti.
company_description: Amaris Consulting is an independent technology consulting firm providing guidance and solutions to businesses. It gathers more than 7,500 people across 5 continents and more than 60 countries.

title: Ufficio Gare e Comunicazione
Clean Utilites & Sustainability Internship
description:
**Clean Utilites \& Sustainability** **I****nternship**

**Anagni (Frosinone), Italy**

**About the job**


Vuoi iniziare la tua carriera nel mondo HealthCare? Unisciti a **Sanofi** e avrai l’opportunità di crescere e sviluppare le tue competenze sotto il coordinamento di stimolanti colleghi, contribuendo a fare la differenza nella vita di migliaia di persone in tutto il mondo. Come tirocinante all’interno del reparto di **Clean Utilites \& Sustainability**, avrai l’opportunità di imparare attività del ruolo, sviluppare nuove capacità, potrai contribuire a lavoro di team in un ambiente stimolante e collaborativo, inoltre avrai l’opportunità di una crescita professionale e formazione continua.


Siamo un'azienda della salute, innovativa e globale, e siamo guidati da uno scopo: **sfidare i confini della scienza per migliorare la vita delle persone.** Lavorare in Sanofi significa appassionarsi al proprio lavoro, crescere di giorno in giorno esplorando tra innumerevoli opportunità, costruire stimolanti relazioni e superare i limiti di ciò che pensavi fosse possibile. *Ready to get started?*

**Le attività che seguirai con il tuo team**

* Supporterai il mantenimento e l'implementazione del **Sistema di Gestione dell’Energia** (ISO 50001\), contribuendo al monitoraggio dei consumi, **KPI energetici** e **azioni di miglioramento** in ambito energia e sostenibilità.
* Parteciperai a progetti di **digitalizzazione e Intelligenza Artificiale** per il monitoraggio e l’ottimizzazione delle **prestazioni energetiche** degli impianti, nonché a progetti legati allo sviluppo di applicazioni volte a ridurre l'impatto ambientale dei dipendenti dello stabilimento.
* Affiancherai il team Clean Utilities nelle attività **operative**, di **manutenzione** preventiva/predittiva e nella **gestione documentale** degli impianti.
* Collaborerai a **studi di fattibilità** e **progetti di investimento** per il miglioramento dell’**efficienza energetica**

**Chi cerchiamo**

* Laurea in Ingegneria **Industriale, Meccanica, Chimica o Energetica**
* Buona conoscenza **dell’inglese** (Livello B2\)
* Interesse per i temi di **sostenibilità**, **energia** e **Intelligenza Artificiale**
* Motivazione a operare in un contesto **multinazionale e tecnologicamente avanzato**
* Capacità di comprensione dei **sistemi impiantistici compless**i (plus)
* Conoscenza di **Pacchetto Office** e piattaforme di Intelligenza Artificiale e AutoCAD(plus)
* **Automunito**/a (il sito produttivo è raggiungibile solo con mezzi propri)

**Perché Sanofi?**

* Dai vita ai miracoli della scienza entrando a far parte di un team coinvolgente e orientato al futuro
* Inizia il tuo percorso professionale sotto il coordinamento di un **tutor qualificato** che stimolerà la tua **crescita professionale** e ti aiuterà a muovere i tuoi primi passi nel mondo del lavoro
* Lo stage è svolto in **presenza**
* Ti offriamo un’opportunità di **tirocinio di 6 mesi**. È previsto un rimborso spese e accesso gratuito alla mensa aziendale.


\#Onsite


\#EarlyTalent

**Pursue** ***Progress*****. Discover** ***Extraordinary*****.**


Il Progresso non avviene senza le persone – persone con background diversi, con origini diverse, con ruoli diversi, tutti uniti da un desiderio comune: far accadere i miracoli. Tu puoi essere una di queste persone. Segui con noi il cambiamento, abbraccia le nuove idee ed esplora tutte le opportunità che abbiamo da offrirti. Ricerchiamo il progresso e scopriamo insieme lo straordinario.

Guarda il nostro ALL IN video e scopri le azioni di Diversity Equity and Inclusion su sanofi.com!

title: Data Maintenance Specialist
description:
ITA Airways, la Compagnia di bandiera italiana sta assumendo!


Abbiamo bisogno di portare a bordo persone qualificate, motivate e con la voglia di mettersi in gioco con passione e iniziativa.


In ambito Operations Control Center, per la funzione Integrated Solutions selezioniamo un/una:  



**Data Maintenance Specialist**

Scopo del ruolo è quello di garantire la supervisione ed il corretto aggiornamento dei sistemi operativi di Operations Control Center e delle banche dati relative per tutti gli aspetti di business facendo da interfaccia tra l’Operations Control Center, le linee operative e la struttura di Information Technology, garantendo l'indirizzamento e la risoluzione delle problematiche emergenti.


**Di cosa ti occuperai?**
-------------------------

* Supportare nell’attività di certificazione e consolidamento dei dati operativi di volo in continuo contatto con il Coordinamento di Rete, l’Hub di Fiumicino, gli scali periferici, ed ogni altro ente coinvolto alla gestione dei voli per ottenere che tutte le realtà aziendali, e soprattutto tutti i sistemi, siano sempre sincronizzati ed aggiornati.
* Contribuire ad assicurare il corretto e completo aggiornamento e gestione delle banche dati di riferimento dei sistemi di gestione operativa, garantendo l’allineamento tra tutti i sistemi in uso nell’area Operations Control Center.
* Supportare nella risoluzione delle criticità legate ai sistemi, emergenti durante lo svolgimento delle Operazioni, attivando ed implementando piani di recovery e fall back in caso di distruption legate ai sistemi.
* Fornire supporto agli utenti dislocati presso gli scali del Network per i sistemi di propria competenza.
* Contribuire all’individuazione di opportunità di ulteriore automazione dei processi allo scopo di ridurre le attività manuali.
* Supportare nell’individuazione delle cause di criticità impattanti trasversalmente sulle aree coinvolte nei processi operativi, proponendo le opportune azioni correttive.
* Assicurare, in sede di contestazione, l’individuazione dei codici dei ritardi attraverso l'analisi degli eventi operativi accaduti interfacciandosi, ove necessario, con le funzioni aziendali coinvolte.
**Cosa stiamo cercando?**
-------------------------

* Requisito minimo diploma in materie tecnico aeronautico o indirizzo informatico, la laurea costituirà elemento preferenziale.
* Ottima conoscenza dei pacchetti informatici Office con particolare riguardo Microsoft Excel e Vba.
* Esperienza con i sistemi di gestione operativa dei voli e\-Business Object costituiscono un titolo preferenziale.
* Ottima padronanza scritta e parlata della lingua inglese (minimo livello B2, preferibilmente C1\).
* Esperienza maturata nel settore aereo o nell’Operations Control Center costituisce titolo preferenziale
**Competenze**
--------------

* Spiccata capacità di problem solving.
* Rapidità di pianificazione ed esecuzione.
* Forte orientamento al risultato.
* Capacità di ragionamento deduttivo.
* Orientamento al cliente interno ed esterno.
* Ottima capacità relazionale e di comunicazione.
* Spiccata attitudine al Team working.
* Capacità di coordinamento, organizzazione e rispetto delle procedure e metodologie di lavoro.
* Capacità di innovazione e spirito d’iniziativa.
* Spiccata capacità di agire in autonomia nell’ambito dei compiti assegnati.
**Cosa offriamo?**
------------------

Contratto CCNL Trasporto Aereo su turni h24 e 7/7\.


RAL: €24\.000 lordi annui. L’offerta retributiva sarà commisurata all’esperienza e alle competenze del candidato/a.


**Dove lavorerai?**
-------------------

Fiumicino, Roma

N 196/2003, nella pagina “Lavora con noi” del sito* *www.ita\-airways.com* *. Le offerte si intendono rivolte a persone di entrambi i sessi (L.903/77\).*

title: Head of Risk & Fraud
description:
**About Eneba**  

At Eneba, we’re building an open, safe and sustainable marketplace for the gamers of today and tomorrow. Our marketplace supports close to 20m\+ active users (and growing fast!), provides a level of trust, safety and market accessibility unparalleled to none. We’re proud of what we’ve accomplished in such a short time and look forward to sharing this journey with you. Join us as we continue to scale, diversify our portfolio, and grow with the evolving community of gamers.  

**About the team**
------------------



The Risk \& Fraud team exists to protect the thing that makes a marketplace work: trust. Every transaction we process depends on us drawing a clean line between genuine players and bad actors, without getting in the way of the good ones.

  

The work spans both ends of the problem: the day\-to\-day defense — alert review, chargeback management, and escalations from Customer Support — and the longer game of partnership strategy, fraud program design, KPI ownership, and staying ahead of how fraud evolves. We don't treat fraud as a cost centre — we treat it as a discipline.

  

**About Your Role**
-------------------



As the **Head of Risk \& Fraud**, you own the line between trust and loss for the entire business.



You're not refereeing from the stands. You set the fraud strategy across all our products, you lead the team, and you own the decisions that actually move the number — which partners we work with, which models we trust, where we draw the risk line, and what we tell Product when a new feature opens a door we'd rather keep shut. You're the person the stakeholders turn to when the question is "how exposed are we, and what are we doing about it?" and you answer with evidence, not vibes.


### **Responsibilities**


* **Owner of the Number:** You own the fraud P\&L. Payout rate, chargeback rate, approval rate, false\-positive rate — across the business, these are yours. You're the one who can explain every movement and who's accountable for the trend line.
* **Leader of the Team:** You won't just run the team; you'll build a strong second line of leadership beneath you and develop the people in it, so the function stays sharp whether or not you're in the room.
* **The Strategy Setter:** You own the fraud\-reduction roadmap. You decide what we build versus buy, where we invest, and how the multi\-product fraud program is designed — then you make sure it actually ships.
* **The Partnership Principal:** You own the commercial and strategic relationships with our fraud\-prevention partners. RFPs, champion\-challenger tests, SLAs, and the negotiations themselves sit with you.
* **The Cross\-functional Bridge:** You're the operational partner to Product, Engineering, Finance, and Legal. When the business builds something new, you make sure fraud risk is designed in from the start — not patched in after the first loss.
* **The Compliance Anchor:** You own our risk\-side regulatory and compliance obligations — PSP requirements, KYC, and law\-enforcement requests — and make sure we're defensible as we scale across markets.
* **The Final Word on Risk:** You're the top escalation point for the hardest risk calls, and you represent Risk \& Fraud in cross\-functional and leadership forums with structure, data, and a clear point of view.
### **Requirements**


* **A Proven Track Record:** You have solid experience in fraud, risk, or financial crime (think **4\+ years** in a fast\-paced or high\-growth environment) and have led a team before. What matters most is the scope you've owned — you've been accountable for fraud outcomes end to end, not just clearing queues.
* **An Owner of Outcomes:** You don't just talk about "reducing fraud" — you have the receipts. You can point to specific times you moved fraud rate, chargeback rate, or approval rate through structural change, and explain the trade\-offs you made to get there.
* **A Commercial Operator:** You've owned partner selection and negotiation, managed budgets and SLAs, and know how to hold a partner accountable to the numbers they promised.
* **A Data Native:** You have a sixth sense for dashboards. You can look at a metric gap, diagnose the root cause, and make the call without waiting for an analyst to hand you the answer. Comfort in SQL / Databricks\-type environments is a strong plus.
* **A Builder of Teams:** You find genuine satisfaction in developing leaders and building a function that thrives independently. You set clear expectations and you coach.
* **Familiar with Our World:** Ideally you've spent time in **digital marketplaces, e\-commerce, payments, or gaming**, and you know the failure modes — promo abuse, reseller fraud, account takeover — and the pace of a high\-volume digital business.
* **Compliance\-Fluent:** You're comfortable operating against regulatory, PSP, and KYC obligations, and you know where the risk function's responsibility starts and stops.
* **A Strong Communicator:** Since we operate internationally, your **written and spoken English** needs to be sharp enough to set strategy, influence executives, and lead a diverse team.
**What it’s like to work at Eneba*** Opportunity to join our Employee Stock Options program.
* Opportunity to help scale a unique product.
* Various bonus systems: performance\-based, referral, additional paid leave, personal learning budget.
* Paid volunteering opportunities.
* Work location of your choice: office, remote, opportunity to work and travel.
* Personal and professional growth at an exponential rate supported by well\-defined feedback and promotion processes.

* Please attach CV's in English.
* To find out about how we handle your personal data, make sure to check out our Candidate Privacy Notice https://www.eneba.com/candidate\-privacy\-notice



We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses and identifying potential inconsistencies or verification signals in application materials based on available information. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

title: Associate Director, Marketing Hospital
description:
**The position**


Lead the end\-to\-end marketing strategy and execution for the Hospital portfolio, with primary focus on biosimilars and hospital products, ensuring successful launches, optimized tender performance, rapid uptake, and sustainable growth.


Act as key strategic orchestrator across functions and main interface with Global/Regional teams, translating global strategy into effective local execution in a tender‑driven hospital environment. **Responsibilities**

  

The role will include but is not limited to:


Hospital Portfolio Strategy \& Brand Leadership

* Define and execute pre‑launch, launch, and post‑launch strategies
* Develop short‑ and long‑term commercial plans aligned with hospital and tender dynamics
* Analyze competitive landscape, treatment pathways, and positioning
* Identify key drivers of adoption including pricing, evidence, and value messaging


Market Access, Tenders \& Institutional Stakeholder Engagement

* Support and shape tender strategies with Market Access
* Contribute to compelling tender value propositions
* Engage key stakeholders (KOLs, hospital pharmacists, payers, decision makers)
* Collaborate with relevant industry and institutional bodies


Forecasting, Tender Planning \& Performance Analytics

* Build forecasts integrating tender timelines, patient flow, and uptake scenarios
* Run scenario planning (pricing, competition, supply)
* Monitor performance and drive data‑based decisions
* Ensure alignment with Market Access, Supply Chain, and Finance


Brand Execution \& Commercial Excellence (Hospital Focus)

* Drive omnichannel campaigns for hospital stakeholders
* Develop sales tools and value materials
* Maximize sales force effectiveness
* Track and optimize hospital‑specific KPIs


Cross‑functional Leadership \& Operational Alignment (Enhanced)

* Ensure alignment across Commercial, Market Access, Supply Chain, Regulatory, and Medical
* Align tender participation, pricing, and portfolio strategy
* Integrate tender outcomes into forecasting and resource planning
* Balance trade‑offs (e.g., supply vs. tender competitiveness)
* Ensure launch and tender readiness across all milestones

Global \& Regional Franchise Interface

* Act as primary contact for Global/Regional teams
* Represent local insights in global discussions
* Translate global strategy into local execution
* Contribute to best‑practice sharing


Compliance \& Governance

* Ensure adherence to industry regulations and local guidelines
* Oversee approval of promotional materials

**Required Education, Experience, and Skills**


Technical

* Strong pharmaceutical marketing experience (hospital preferred)
* Deep understanding of hospital procurement, tenders, and patient pathways
* Proven launch experience

Leadership

* Strong cross‑functional leadership in a matrix environment
* Ability to manage complexity and influence stakeholders

Soft Skills

* Strategic mindset with strong execution focus
* Ability to navigate ambiguity
* Excellent communication and decision‑making skills

Experience

* 8–12\+ years in pharmaceuticals
* Solid hospital / specialty care background
* Proven launch experience
* Scientific or business degree (MBA a plus)
* Fluent English

Additional

* Experience with hospital portfolios
* Experience managing complex launches and constraints
* International exposure preferred
* Understanding of value‑based healthcare and institutional decision‑making

Organon delivers ingenious health solutions that enable people to live their best lives. We are a $6\.5 billion global healthcare company focused on making a world of difference for women, their families and the communities they care for. We have an important portfolio and are growing it by investing in the unmet needs of Women’s Health, expanding access to leading biosimilars and touching lives with a diverse and trusted portfolio of health solutions. Our Vision is clear: A better and healthier every day for every woman.

**Description:**
----------------


We are seeking a talented individual to join our **Risk Advanced Technology team at Risk Consulting** through our **Professional Graduate Programme** . This role will be based in Rome for a hybrid role.


**Risk Consulting**is a management consulting firm that provides risk management services as part of **Marsh Risk** , a leader in insurance brokerage and head of the international Marsh Group, a group of expertise in strategic and management consulting, reinsurance, human capital, and investments ( **Oliver Wyman, Guy Carpenter, Mercer** ).


The **Risk Advanced Technology**practice develops innovative risk management services using advanced technologies (Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, Process Mining, and Business Intelligence) to support leading **public and private** organizations.  



**We will count on you to:**


* Support the application of Machine Learning and AI techniques to analyze risk phenomena across heterogeneous domains (e.g., financial risk, operational risk), detect anomalies/fraud, reduce processing times, and contribute to simplifying business processes with a view to intelligent automation.
* Contribute to the development of quantitative and financial models, also in the Credit Risk area (e.g., PD, LGD, EAD, Pricing, stress testing, ECL), with the support of more senior professionals and in line with leading market best practices.
* Perform data analysis, dynamic reporting, risk monitoring dashboards, and early warning systems using Business Intelligence and Advanced Analytics tools.
* Support clients in developing and evolving risk management frameworks and digital transformation processes.
* Collaborate in the development of new solutions and methodologies (e.g., Generative AI applied to risk management, explainable ML models, process automation, advanced analytics).
* Take part in the various project phases: requirements gathering, functional analysis, modeling, implementation, testing, and go\-live support.
* Prepare deliverables, analyses, and project presentations, contributing to the quality of the work and the clarity of communication with the client.
* Interact with clients and project stakeholders, with team support, presenting analytical evidence and results clearly and effectively.
**What you need to have:**


* Master’s degree or higher in Management, Management Engineering, Computer Science, Statistics, Financial Mathematics, or related STEM disciplines, with an excellent academic record.
* 1–2 years of experience in consulting, data analytics, risk management, model development, or related fields. Interest and/or solid foundations in one or more of the following areas:
* Technical skills (vertical) in one or more of the following areas:
* Data analysis and modeling using Business Intelligence tools (e.g., Power BI).
* Basic/intermediate knowledge of Machine Learning / AI: supervised and unsupervised models (e.g., classification, regression, clustering, anomaly detection).
* Familiarity with Credit Risk models and concepts (e.g., PD, LGD, EAD, ECL).
* Good knowledge of Python for data analysis and automation (e.g., pandas, scikit\-learn, openpyxl , or equivalent libraries).
* Knowledge of Power Platform tools (e.g., Power Apps, Power Automate, Dataverse) is a plus.
* Basic/intermediate knowledge of relational databases.
* Management skills (horizontal):
* Ability to draft project documentation and prepare presentations and deliverables.
* Strong analytical skills, attention to detail, and a structured approach to problem solving.
* Strong interpersonal and communication skills, with a collaborative mindset and ability to engage with both technical and non\-technical stakeholders.
* Interest in risk management, business processes, and digital transformation.
**What makes you stand out:**  



* Experience, even at an early stage, in developing solutions that combine analytics, Machine Learning, LLMs, and code\-based tools (e.g., Python) and/or low\-code tools.
* Familiarity with the banking and credit regulatory context (e.g., Basel framework, CRR, EBA Guidelines/RTS, IFRS 9\).
* Knowledge of Data Visualization and Data Management tools (e.g., Power BI, DAX, SQL, Azure).
* Knowledge of the main Risk Management frameworks (e.g., ISO 31000, COSO Framework).
* Interest in Generative AI applications for risk management.
* Any relevant certifications or training paths in data, risk, analytics, or cloud.
**Why join our team:**


* You will join an international, cross\-business organization, part of a leading group in professional services in Strategy, Risk, and People.
* You will have the opportunity to work on innovative projects in the field of Risk Management, with real\-world applications for the Italian Public Administration and the private sector.
* You will be part of a growth\-oriented environment, with the opportunity to develop quantitative, technological, and consulting skills while working closely with senior professionals.
**What****we****offer** **:**


* The position starts with an **apprenticeship contract.**
* We propose a gross annual salary starting from € 28\. 000 for a full\-time position.The National Collective Bargaining Agreement (NCBA) applied is " Terziario , Distribuzione e Servizi”.
* Additional attractive benefits offered with the apprenticeship contract: insurance coverages, supplementary pension plan, facultative health assistance, flexible benefits, optional stock purchase plan. Further details will be shared during the selection process.
Marsh Risk is a business of Marsh (NYSE: MRSH), a global leader in risk, reinsurance and capital, people and investments, and management consulting, advising clients in 130 countries. With annual revenue of over $27 billion and more than 95,000 colleagues, Marsh helps build the confidence to thrive through the power of perspective. For more information about Marsh Risk, visit marsh.com, or follow us on LinkedIn and X.
### **Marsh is committed to creating a diverse, inclusive and flexible work environment. We aim to attract and retain the best people and embrace diversity of age, background, disability, ethnic origin, family duties, gender orientation or expression, marital status, nationality, parental status, personal or social status, political affiliation, race, religion and beliefs, sex/gender, sexual orientation or expression, skin color, or any other characteristic protected by applicable law.**

### **Marsh is committed to hybrid work, which includes the flexibility of working remotely and the collaboration, connections and professional development benefits of working together in the office. All Marsh colleagues are expected to be in their local office or working onsite with clients at least three days per week. Office\-based teams will identify at least one “anchor day” per week on which their full team will be together in person.**

title: Senior Director Brand and Content - 100% Remote - Europe
description:
**NOTE: This is a FULLY remote role, but the candidate must be within** **Europe** **to collaborate with their team, peers, and internal customers. You do not have to be in the specific country or city shown in this listing, but** **please only apply if you are physically based within** **Europe****.**


Trusted by 20,000\+ property managers worldwide, Hostaway is an industry leading, AI\-powered vacation rental management platform designed for professional short\-term rental operators. Hostaway brings everything together for greater efficiency and faster growth.

  

Profitable, high\-growth, and the first short\-term rental PMS unicorn . Join us at our most exciting stage yet! Learn more about our recent valuation and story here.


Hostaway is seeking a highly motivated Senior Director of Content \& Brand to join our team and drive our growth in the market.

### **About the role**


Hostaway is looking for a Senior Director of Brand and Content to build and lead the brand, content, and creative engine for our next stage of growth as a leading B2B SaaS platform for professional short\-term rental operators. This is a high\-impact SaaS marketing leadership role for someone who can shape our market narrative, elevate our category presence, and create content and creative programs that support awareness, pipeline, customer acquisition, and revenue growth.


You’ll build the function largely from the ground up, including the team, operating model, workflows, AI\-enabled production systems, and quality standards. This role will partner closely with Product Marketing, Demand Generation, Sales, Marketing Operations, and Product to ensure Hostaway’s brand, content, and creative output is aligned with SaaS GTM priorities, buyer journeys, product launches, demand generation, and measurable business outcomes.

### **Your mission**

* Build and lead a team that will own the modern content engine that produces high\-quality, high\-velocity editorial, thought leadership, and demand\-supporting content.
* Build and lead a small team that will define and own Hostaway's brand strategy, positioning, narrative architecture, and visual identity system for a fast\-growing global vertical SaaS company
* Build the in\-house Creative team from scratch including designers, copywriters, motion/video, and production talent.
* Across Content/Brand/Creative, utilize AI teammates who will drive efficiency while humans drive quality, designing workflows where generative tools handle research, drafting, variation, localization, and asset production, while humans own strategy, narrative, taste, and final quality.
* Partner closely with Product Marketing, Demand Generation, Sales, Marketing Operations and Product to align brand, content, and creative to support GTM priorities and drive revenue growth.
* Hire, mentor, and develop the brand, content, and creative team, making smart early bets on senior leaders, hands\-on makers, and hybrid AI\-native talent.
* Decide the right mix of in\-house team, agencies, freelancers, and AI\-augmented partners; manage vendor relationships and budget accordingly.
* Define KPIs across brand health, content performance, creative effectiveness, AI productivity gains, LLM/AI discoverability, and revenue contribution.
* 12\+ years of progressive experience across content, brand, and/or creative leadership, with significant experience in B2B SaaS marketing.
* 5\+ years of experience building and leading teams, including hiring senior talent and developing high\-performing creative or editorial professionals.
* Experience marketing to SMB or mid\-market SaaS buyers, ideally in a high\-velocity, transactional sales and marketing environment.
* Proven ability to build a SaaS marketing function or sub\-function from the ground up, including strategy, team structure, workflows, tools, and execution standards.
* Strong understanding of SaaS GTM motions, buyer journeys, product marketing, demand generation, lifecycle content, and sales enablement.
* Strong editorial instincts, storytelling ability, and creative judgment, with a clear sense of what makes B2B SaaS content and creative effective.
* Hands\-on fluency with AI tools for content, brand, and creative work, including a practical point of view on where AI improves quality, speed, and scale.
* Strong cross\-functional leadership skills, executive presence, and a track record of connecting brand, content, and creative work to measurable SaaS business outcomes such as pipeline, revenue, retention, and category authority.

### **What we offer**

* **Competitive Compensation:** We offer competitive pay based on market rates in the country of the applicant.
* **100% Remote:** Enjoy the freedom to work from anywhere within your country of residence—be it a co\-working space, your home office, or even your dining room table. The choice is yours. Just don’t ask to work in our office (we don’t have one).
* **Equity:** Every role in our company comes with valuable stock options in a fast\-growing and profitable company. This ensures we all share in the company’s success.
* **Values\-Driven Leadership:** Our Core Values are not just words we’ve written to make us feel good. We leverage them daily when making strategic and tactical decisions.
* **Professional Growth:** Our rapid growth offers unparalleled learning and development opportunities, along with a multitude of career advancement opportunities.
* **Annual Paid Leave:** The specific amounts vary by country and are aligned with country and/or contract\-specific norms.
* **Geographic Specific Benefits:** As an international employer, we offer different country\-specific benefits such as Health Insurance and Pensions in countries where these perks are customary. The specifics depend on the country of the applicant.
* **Dynamic Team Culture:** As a global company with team members in over 40 countries, our diverse and international culture fuels our innovation and creativity, providing a key pillar to our success (and making it a lot of fun to work here).


Thank you for your interest. If you apply for this role, you will receive an email from our Talent Acquisition team after your application has been reviewed alongside the qualifications for this role and the qualifications of others who have applied.
